articles.title: Iran war hits tea export; Assam releases ₹94.7 crore support

articles.title: RBI aligns capital rules of banks with global norms
articles.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has updated bank capital rules, aligning them with global standards and clarifying how lenders assess trading partner default risk. Updated 'add-on' percentages for off-balance-sheet trades like derivatives are now in effect, impacting capital requirements for clearing members on exchanges.
